sections.title: Purpose of Collecting Information
sections.content: We use your information to respond to enquiries, share itineraries, contact you for follow-ups, and improve our services.

sections.title: Cookies and Tracking
sections.content: Our website may use basic cookies or analytics tools to understand traffic. You may disable cookies in your browser.

sections.title: Information Sharing
sections.content: Information may be shared with service partners only after booking confirmation or when required by law.

sections.title: Advertising & Communication
sections.content: By submitting details, you consent to being contacted via call, WhatsApp, SMS, or email. You may opt out anytime.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We use reasonable security measures including SSL encryption.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.content: Information is retained only as long as necessary and may be deleted upon request.

sections.title: Children's Privacy
sections.content: Our services are not intended for individuals under 18.

sections.title: Changes to Policy
sections.content: We may update this policy at any time.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: These Terms & Conditions govern the use of the website and services offered by Yugen India Travel ("we", "our", "us"). By accessing our website or submitting an enquiry, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions.

sections.title: Nature of Services
sections.content: Yugen India Travel is a privately operated travel service provider offering travel planning and booking assistance for destinations within India. We are not affiliated with any government body or temple authority.

sections.title: Use of Website
sections.content: The website is for general information and enquiry purposes only. Submitting an enquiry does not guarantee availability or booking confirmation.

sections.title: Bookings & Confirmations
sections.content: All bookings are subject to availability and confirmation by service providers. Final confirmation is provided only after mutual agreement and required advance payment.

sections.title: Payments
sections.content: Payments, if applicable, are accepted offline or through mutually agreed methods. We do not process online payments through our website.

sections.title: Cancellations & Refunds
sections.content: Cancellation and refund terms depend on service providers and will be communicated at the time of booking.

sections.title: Travel Risks & Responsibilities
sections.content: Pilgrimage tours may involve high-altitude travel and weather dependency. Travellers must assess their health before travel. We are not responsible for delays, injuries, or disruptions beyond our control.

sections.title: Force Majeure
sections.content: We are not liable for delays caused by natural disasters, weather, government restrictions, or events beyond our control.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: We act only as a facilitator and are not responsible for acts or omissions of third-party service providers.

sections.title: User Conduct
sections.content: Users must not misuse the website or submit false information.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: All website content belongs to Yugen India Travel and may not be copied without permission.

sections.title: Third-Party Links
sections.content: We are not responsible for third-party websites linked from our site.

sections.title: Governing Law & Jurisdiction
sections.content: These terms are governed by the laws of India. Jurisdiction shall be Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh.

refund.heading: REFUND & CANCELLATION POLICY – YUGEN INDIA TRAVEL

sections.title: Introduction
sections.content: This Refund & Cancellation Policy governs cancellations and refunds for services offered by Yugen India Travel ("we", "our", "us"). By submitting an enquiry or confirming a booking, you agree to this policy.

sections.title: Nature of Bookings
sections.content: Yugen India Travel operates on an enquiry-based booking model. Bookings are confirmed only after mutual agreement and receipt of advance payment, where applicable.

sections.title: Cancellation by Customer
sections.content: Cancellation requests must be communicated in writing via email or WhatsApp. Cancellation charges depend on service providers such as hotels, transport operators, and vendors. Charges may vary based on travel dates, season, and time of cancellation.
bullets: Cancellation requests must be communicated in writing via email or WhatsApp.
Cancellation charges depend on service providers such as hotels, transport operators, and vendors.
Charges may vary based on travel dates, season, and time of cancellation.

sections.title: Indicative Cancellation Charges
bullets: More than 15 days before travel: Minimal or no cancellation charges (subject to supplier policy)
7–15 days before travel: Partial cancellation charges may apply
Less than 7 days before travel or no-show: No refund may be applicable
sections.note: The exact cancellation terms will be shared at the time of booking confirmation.

sections.title: Refund Policy
bullets: Refunds, if applicable, will be processed after deducting cancellation charges levied by service providers.
Refund processing time may take 7–14 working days.
Refunds will be made through the original mode of payment or mutually agreed method.
We are not responsible for delays caused by banks or payment service providers.

sections.title: Cancellation by Yugen India Travel
sections.content: We reserve the right to cancel a booking due to unavoidable circumstances such as:
sections.note: In such cases, we will offer a suitable alternative or refund as per supplier policies.

sections.title: Non-Refundable Components
sections.content: Certain services such as permits, helicopter bookings, peak-season hotels, or special arrangements may be non-refundable. These will be clearly communicated at the time of booking.

sections.title: Force Majeure
sections.content: No refunds shall be applicable for cancellations caused due to force majeure events beyond our control.

sections.title: Changes to Bookings
sections.content: Any changes requested after confirmation are subject to availability and additional charges, if applicable.

sections.title: Policy Updates
sections.content: Yugen India Travel reserves the right to modify this policy at any time. Updates will be effective upon posting.
